enriched_points.expanded_content: Integrating biochemical and thermochemical processes enhances efficiency, maximizing resource recovery and minimizing waste, leading to sustainable agricultural practices and improved economic viability.

Successful initiatives showcase multi-valorization strategies utilizing agricultural residues, demonstrating effective conversion to biogas, biofuels, and biochemicals, contributing to both sustainability and profitability.

Emerging technologies, including nanotechnology and machine learning, promise to optimize waste valorization, paving the way for innovative solutions in circular economy frameworks and sustainable agriculture.
